name: Ultrawide 21:9 UI
description: Companion to SBCameraScroll that makes 21:9 (and wider) seamless OUTSIDE gameplay. Forces a 768-tall internal render at a 21:9 width (so the UI coordinate space stays valid), stretches uniform full-screen filters (pause darken, fades, ghost/electric flashes, letterbox bars) to span the full width, and fixes genuine wide-screen layout bugs (safe-area offsets, slideshow centring). Hand-drawn art stays centred + pillarboxed. Set SBCameraScroll's own Resolution option to Default and pick your monitor preset in this mod's config (BepInEx/config/kai.ultrawide219.cfg).
